title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: What social issue do you care most about? Why?
Do you think young people today are more or less interested in social causes?
Have you ever participated in any kind of community action or volunteering?
How do you think social media has changed the way people engage with social issues?
Is there a cause you would donate money or time to? What is it?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think young people have more or less power to change society than older generations?
Is it the responsibility of individuals or governments to solve social problems?
What do you think is the most urgent issue facing society today?
